name: Granite 3D Imitation Stone Paint
leadtext: Meitu granite 3D imitation stone paint is a kind of a paint which is completely similar to natural granite stone. It is also called multi color coating. It mainly uses acrylic emulsion as the base material with different sizes of sand as the main raw material, and adopts the Chinese German scientific formula and advanced production technology to produce the similar shapes and the surface of the building.
features: Natural stone and Granite Like finish
Provides a decorative and protective plaster coat
